title: Do you still need Redux?
description: Redux vs Zustand, Jotai, and React state.

options: Large app, complex flows, cross-team, time-travel debugging matters
questions.explanation: For simple apps, useState + context often suffice.

options: Minimal API, hook-based, no context provider needed
questions.explanation: Popular Redux alternative for lighter apps.

options: Atomic state — small independent units that compose

questions.explanation: Separate server state from client state.
